name: Winter Greens Puttanesca
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Tender fresh spinach or arugula, washed with tough stems removed
Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
8 oz Rigatoni or other wide-tube pasta
Coarsely grated Parmesan cheese, for garnish (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut roasted peppers lengthwise into 1/4 inch strips.
2. Coarsely chop the olives.
3. Place the spinach or arugula in a large bowl. Sprinkle with minced garlic and season generously with black pepper. Add the pepper flakes and chopped olives. Toss everything together well.
4. Cut anchovies in half crosswise and add to spinach mixture. Toss the mixture with olive oil.
5. Before serving, bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta until al dente. Drain pasta and rinse under warm water to remove excess starch; toss with the spinach mixture. Serve immediately, sprinkled with coarsely grated Parmesan cheese if desired.
